description: Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles, legs at the base and crocodile pattern, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality. Height: 9& rdquo Length: 12.5& rdquo Width: 3& rdquo Made from 100% genuine nappa leather Has two roomy zippered compartments, one with organiser sleeves to hold a mobile and the other has an inner zippered compartment for essentials Two short handles with stud detailing and crocodile pattern for carrying ease and style Brand name embossed on the side Warranty: 6 Months Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
